text: "I am Alpha and Omega"... These are the names of the first and last letters of the Greek alphabet, and signify the same as what follows: The beginning and the end: the first cause and last end of all beings: who is, and who was, and who is to come, the Almighty—These words signify the true God only, and are here applied to our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, who is to come again to judge the living and the dead.
